prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: ArsB from L. ferriphilum bound to arsenite in inward-facing state (parallel dimer). Entity description: Arsenical pump membrane protein. Entry keywords: MEMBRANE PROTEIN arsenite, membrane transporter, secondary transporter, membrane protein. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.601336; mean_interface=0.325156; max_segment_membrane_density=1.0; mean_disorder=0.111623. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.

V68 E65 topology sentinel source. membrane_context_strong transmembrane_context topology_evidence transmembrane topology; biological_oligomer_context may be incidental but explicit topology has priority. Coordinates, contacts, and native topology remain post-seal holdout only.
